analysis: The defense|energy_oil signal has a high confidence score of 98 but includes articles from Cointelegraph.com News which are being inappropriately scored for non-crypto sectors. The source diversity scoring in scorer.py does not penalize crypto-specialist outlets like Cointelegraph when they appear in non-crypto sectors, leading to inflated confidence scores. This is evident in the performance data where Cointelegraph appears in the sources for the defense|energy_oil signal which has a confidence score of 98.0.
change_description: Penalize crypto-specialist outlets in non-crypto sectors
